name: Exzeo Group, Inc.
business: Exzeo Group, Inc. provides turnkey insurance technology and operations solutions to property and casualty (P&C) insurance carriers and their agents through a proprietary platform called the Exzeo Platform. The platform includes advanced underwriting solutions, data analytics, and insurance management services. Revenue is generated from underwriting and management services, claim services, and other technology services, typically based on a percentage of insurance premium managed or transaction activity.

exposures.sentence: We provide turnkey insurance technology and operations solutions to P&C insurance carriers and their agents through a proprietary platform of purpose built software and data analytics applications.
Carriers can better analyze risk through enhanced pricing models, artificial intelligence and machine learning technology.
